managementSummary.narrativeSummary: The investment in employee wellness platforms demonstrates measurable returns with strong adoption rates and consistent engagement patterns. Analysis reveals positive behavioral shifts across wellness categories, contributing to both individual wellbeing and organizational productivity.

engagementDepth.label: Power Users (3+ features)
engagementDepth.behavior: Use mood + habits + steps or recognition. Very committed.

engagementDepth.label: Dual Users (2 features)
engagementDepth.behavior: Typically mood + one other. Showing stickiness.

engagementDepth.label: Single Feature
engagementDepth.behavior: Tried one feature only. At risk of dropping off.

retentionHealth.title: Retention Health
retentionHealth.summary: 47 users haven't been active in 30+ days. WhatsApp nudge can win them back.

whatThisMeans.title: WHAT THIS MEANS
whatThisMeans.headline: 50% of active users only use one feature.
whatThisMeans.description: This is both a risk and an opportunity. A well-designed program that combines 2-3 features (e.g., mood + recognition + a poll) can push single-feature users into dual/power territory, which directly increases retention.

benefit24x7.description: Employees use the platform both during work hours and personal time, indicating strong engagement.

keyInsight.text: Engagement has fluctuated significantly, indicating potential issues with user retention and feature adoption.

timingRecommendations.title: Best launch day
timingRecommendations.description: Sunday evening or Monday morning to ride the Sun-Mon momentum.

timingRecommendations.title: Mood nudge sweet spot
timingRecommendations.description: 3:00 PM (SGT)-5:00 PM (SGT) local time — peak engagement window for lightweight check-ins.

timingRecommendations.title: Evening wellness
timingRecommendations.description: 4:00 PM (SGT)-6:00 PM (SGT) - ideal for meditation, habit reminders, and low-friction nudges.

successMetrics.title: Success Metrics (4-Week Targets)
successMetrics.subtitle: Check if the AI game plan is moving the right levers for adoption and culture.
